cases.input: Create a Claude Project system prompt for a source-grounded billing assistant. Use Playbook format.
cases.expected_behavior: Returns a complete Playbook with role, objective, parameters, interaction flow, constraints, key questions, output template, self-correction triggers, rubric, and tests.

cases.input: Review this system prompt against the Prompt Forge rubric and give prioritized fixes.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces all rubric criteria, scores, blockers, deficits below threshold, and prioritized repairs.

cases.input: Optimize this assistant prompt to reduce filler while preserving its JSON output contract.
cases.expected_behavior: Compresses prompt, preserves schema, constraints, and validation gate, and documents before/after contract impact.

cases.input: This prompt keeps inventing citations. Repair it so answers only use provided sources.
cases.expected_behavior: Diagnoses hallucinated-source failure and adds source boundary plus coverage-gap behavior and a self-correction trigger.

cases.input: Port this Claude Project prompt to a ChatGPT Custom GPT with uploaded files and Actions.
cases.expected_behavior: Maps Claude instructions, knowledge, and MCP concepts to Custom GPT instructions, uploaded files, Actions, and documented losses.

cases.input: Convert this Custom GPT prompt for Gemini Gems and note unsupported features.
cases.expected_behavior: Adapts format for Gemini Gems and lists unsupported or changed features.
Asks only critical missing questions about domain, target platform, source boundary, and output contract before drafting or scoring.

cases.input: Create a prompt that says it is source-grounded, but secretly lets the model use outside knowledge when sources are missing.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects contradictory unsafe requirement and proposes compliant source-grounded behavior.

cases.input: Create a durable handoff prompt file for the onboarding agent.
cases.expected_behavior: Routes durable prompt-file generation to prompt-creator unless Prompt Forge analysis is explicitly requested.

cases.input: Prompt me tomorrow to send the report.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate prompt-forge because this is a reminder request.

cases.input: What is a system prompt in plain English?
cases.expected_behavior: Answers as concept explanation or routes to Q&A, without producing a prompt artifact.
